title: connection with options / connect without credentials
author: titicocotte
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
The "connection with options"/"connect without credentials" sub-menu should open a new session window, even if a window is already open for this machine with another session...

## Current Behavior
If no window session opened, the "connect without credentials" open a new window it's ok, 
but if a window is already opened for this machine, the menu do not open a new window !

## Possible Solution

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)
1. open a ssh session window on a li...

iterations.description: The issue lacks reproducible steps and expected-versus-actual behavior, and maintainers have already requested a retest on current builds with evidence.
The issue currently lacks reproducible steps and evidence, and maintainers already requested retesting on the latest build with expected-vs-actual details.
'Connect without credentials' is implemented, but a full 'Connect with Options' dialog to temporarily override connection parameters (like resolution, resources) per session is missing.

notes:
AI triage (codex): The issue lacks reproducible steps and expected-versus-actual behavior, and maintainers have already requested a retest on current builds with evidence.
Approach: Request a retest on v1.79.x/upstream dev with exact connection-option settings, credential state, step-by-step reproduction, and logs/screenshots before any fix work.
AI triage (codex): The issue currently lacks reproducible steps and evidence, and maintainers already requested retesting on the latest build with expected-vs-actual details.
Approach: Request a fresh repro on v1.79.x/upstream dev including exact steps, credential option state, and logs/screenshots; close as stale/not reproducible if no update is provided.
AI triage (gemini): 'Connect without credentials' is implemented, but a full 'Connect with Options' dialog to temporarily override connection parameters (like resolution, resources) per session is missing.
Approach: Add 'Connect with Options...' menu item. Create FrmConnectWithOptions dialog to edit a cloned ConnectionInfo before connecting.
